candidates.notes: H1 strongly supported with very large effect size. H2 not supported (positive correlation instead of negative). Random decoder baseline shows minimal absorption (0.059), confirming training is necessary for hierarchical representations.

h2_frequency_correlation.interpretation: Positive correlation contradicts competitive exclusion hypothesis

next_steps: Run full experiment with 5 seeds and multiple L0 targets
Drop or reformulate H2 (frequency correlation not supported)
Consider implementing H3 (steering intervention) if time permits
Consider implementing H_Safe (safety-critical analysis) if time permits
